capsules.problem: FragCap auth skill was continuously polling auth-poll.mjs in a loop after starting Device Flow, wasting resources and blocking the session
capsules.author: gh:anonymous-fb2cd9da
capsules.summary: Changed the auth skill to stop after displaying the verification URL and user code, ending the turn. Polling only happens when the user sends a follow-up message, making the flow non-blocking and resource-efficient.
